'''鈭歞-s-g''' ('''kadasag''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:jugulate|jugulate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-s-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jugulate|jugulate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歞-s-g
|-
! Lemma
| kadasag
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidasag|thidasag]] || [[word:jidasag|jidasag]] || [[word:shidasag|shidasag]] || [[word:kidasag|kidasag]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthudasag|thuthudasag]] || [[word:jujudasag|jujudasag]] || [[word:shushudasag|shushudasag]] || [[word:kukudasag|kukudasag]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thudasag|thudasag]] || [[word:judasag|judasag]] || [[word:shudasag|shudasag]] || [[word:kudasag|kudasag]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thudasag|thudasag]] || [[word:judasag|judasag]] || [[word:shudasag|shudasag]] || [[word:kudasag|kudasag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thedasag|thedasag]] || [[word:jedasag|jedasag]] || [[word:shedasag|shedasag]] || [[word:kedasag|kedasag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothodasag|thothodasag]] || [[word:jojodasag|jojodasag]] || [[word:shoshodasag|shoshodasag]] || [[word:kokodasag|kokodasag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thodasag|thodasag]] || [[word:jodasag|jodasag]] || [[word:shodasag|shodasag]] || [[word:kodasag|kodasag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodasag|thodasag]] || [[word:jodasag|jodasag]] || [[word:shodasag|shodasag]] || [[word:kodasag|kodasag]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:dasag|dasag]] || [[word:dasag|dasag]] || [[word:dasag|dasag]] || [[word:dasag|dasag]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:dasag|dasag]] || [[word:dasag|dasag]] || [[word:dasag|dasag]] || [[word:dasag|dasag]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:dasag|dasag]] || [[word:dasag|dasag]] || [[word:dasag|dasag]] || [[word:dasag|dasag]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:dasag|dasag]] || [[word:dasag|dasag]] || [[word:dasag|dasag]] || [[word:dasag|dasag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙dasag|th忙dasag]] || [[word:j忙dasag|j忙dasag]] || [[word:sh忙dasag|sh忙dasag]] || [[word:k忙dasag|k忙dasag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathadasag|thathadasag]] || [[word:jajadasag|jajadasag]] || [[word:shashadasag|shashadasag]] || [[word:kakadasag|kakadasag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadasag|thadasag]] || [[word:jadasag|jadasag]] || [[word:shadasag|shadasag]] || [[word:kadasag|kadasag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadasag|thadasag]] || [[word:jadasag|jadasag]] || [[word:shadasag|shadasag]] || [[word:kadasag|kadasag]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shadasag|shadasag]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshadasag|goshadasag]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishadasag|gokishadasag]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shadasagn眉|shadasagn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshadasagnkn眉|goshadasagnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishadasagn眉|gokishadasagn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shadasagsh毛|shadasagsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshadasagnksh毛|goshadasagnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishadasagsh毛|gokishadasagsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadasagro|shadasagro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadasagnkro|goshadasagnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadasagro|gokishadasagro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shadasagmu|shadasagmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadasagnkmu|goshadasagnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadasagmu|gokishadasagmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shadasagsher|shadasagsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshadasagnksher|goshadasagnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishadasagsher|gokishadasagsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shadasagng|shadasagng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshadasagnkng|goshadasagnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishadasagng|gokishadasagng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shadasagya|shadasagya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshadasagnkya|goshadasagnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishadasagya|gokishadasagya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shadasagyam|shadasagyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshadasagnkyam|goshadasagnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishadasagyam|gokishadasagyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadasagn眉sh毛|shadasagn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadasagnkn眉sh毛|goshadasagnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadasagn眉sh毛|gokishadasagn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadasagn眉ro|shadasagn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadasagnkn眉ro|goshadasagnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadasagn眉ro|gokishadasagn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadasagn眉mu|shadasagn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadasagnkn眉mu|goshadasagnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadasagn眉mu|gokishadasagn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadasagsh毛n眉|shadasagsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadasagnksh毛n眉|goshadasagnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadasagsh毛n眉|gokishadasagsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadasagsh毛ro|shadasagsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadasagnksh毛ro|goshadasagnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadasagsh毛ro|gokishadasagsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadasagsh毛mu|shadasagsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadasagnksh毛mu|goshadasagnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadasagsh毛mu|gokishadasagsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadasagron眉|shadasagron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadasagnkron眉|goshadasagnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadasagron眉|gokishadasagron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadasagrosh毛|shadasagrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadasagnkrosh毛|goshadasagnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadasagrosh毛|gokishadasagrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadasagromu|shadasagromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadasagnkromu|goshadasagnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadasagromu|gokishadasagromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadasagmun眉|shadasagmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadasagnkmun眉|goshadasagnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadasagmun眉|gokishadasagmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadasagmush毛|shadasagmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadasagnkmush毛|goshadasagnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadasagmush毛|gokishadasagmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadasagmuro|shadasagmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadasagnkmuro|goshadasagnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadasagmuro|gokishadasagmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c6f8e69}}
